sourcePrompt: A water monitor lizard standing in a high-walk pause, about a meter and a half from snout to tail-tip - half of it muscular tail. A big amphibious lizard on four splayed bent legs with long claws, a long neck carrying a tapered snout with a flicking tongue, and a deep keeled tail trailing in a curve. Dark gray-brown skin flecked with yellow speckle rows, watchful and prehistoric.
